seo_title: AI Outfit Generator — Try On New Outfits From One Photo | LazyKiwi
seo_description: Generate new outfits on your own photo with the LazyKiwi AI outfit generator. Restyle any look — streetwear, formal, cottagecore and more — in seconds, no fitting room needed.

hero.title: Restyle your look without the fitting room.
hero.description: Upload one photo and dress it in a brand-new outfit. Try streetwear, formalwear, cottagecore or vacation looks on yourself in seconds.

what_it_is.title: Plan an outfit before you buy a thing.
what_it_is.intro: The LazyKiwi AI outfit generator restyles the clothes in your photo while keeping your face and pose, so you can preview a whole new look for an event, a shoot or a shopping list — without trying anything on.

steps.title: Upload your photo
steps.description: A clear, well-lit photo is all you need. Your photo, your starting point.

steps.title: Pick an outfit style
steps.description: Pick a style preset or describe the outfit, fabric and vibe you want.

steps.title: Generate & download
steps.description: Preview the result, try a few more, then download your favourite.

features.title: Any aesthetic, fitted to you
features.description: From minimalist to maximalist, the AI dresses your photo in a coherent look that actually fits your body and pose.

features.title: Preview event looks in seconds
features.description: See how a wedding-guest, interview or date-night outfit reads on you before committing to a purchase.

features.title: Fresh looks for your feed
features.description: Generate a styled set without a photoshoot — perfect for fashion creators and lookbooks.

showcase.title: Every aesthetic, one upload
showcase.subtitle: Restyle your photo across looks and occasions.

cards.title: Seconds, not days
cards.description: Results render almost instantly, so you can compare options before your coffee's cold.

cards.title: Private by default
cards.description: Your photos are processed securely and never sold. What you upload stays yours.

cards.title: Free to start
cards.description: No credit card to try. Get a real result on your own photo at zero cost.

cards.title: No regret
cards.description: Test the change risk-free and decide with your own eyes.

cards.title: Made for you
cards.description: Tuned for natural, believable results — not a filter slapped on top.

cards.title: No skills needed
cards.description: No Photoshop, no prompts to master. Upload, tap, done.

quotes.quote: I was nervous to try this, saw it on my own photo in seconds, and I'm obsessed. So much easier than guessing.
quotes.name: Mia R.

quotes.quote: Showed the LazyKiwi preview instead of trying to describe what I wanted. First time I got exactly what I pictured.
quotes.name: Daniel K.

quotes.quote: My before/after post blew up — it looks real because the outfit actually fits. Total game changer.
quotes.name: Priya S.

faqs.question: Is the outfit generator free?
faqs.answer: Yes. Upload a photo and generate new outfits for free.

faqs.question: Does my face stay the same?
faqs.answer: Yes. Only the clothing and styling change; your face and pose are kept.

faqs.question: Can I describe a specific outfit?
faqs.answer: Yes. Use a preset or describe the exact garment, color and vibe you want.

faqs.question: What photo works best?
faqs.answer: A clear full-body or upper-body photo with your outfit visible and good lighting.

cta.title: Restyle your look in one upload.
cta.description: Upload a photo and let LazyKiwi dress it in a brand-new outfit in seconds — no fitting room.
